subject: Re: Complaint {complaint_id} — Deposit Account Concern
body:
Dear {customer_name},

Thank you for contacting us about your checking or savings account. We have registered your complaint (ID {complaint_id}) and our team is reviewing the account activity you reported.

Under {clause}, we will investigate and provide a substantive update by {resolution_due}. If a provisional credit applies while we complete our review, we will advise you accordingly.

Regards,
Customer Care Team

subject: Re: Complaint {complaint_id} — Credit Card Concern
body:
Dear {customer_name},

Thank you for raising your credit card concern. Your complaint (ID {complaint_id}) has been logged and our team is reviewing the charges, fees, or statement entries you identified.

In line with {clause}, we will complete our billing-error review and respond by {resolution_due}. You are not required to pay the disputed amount while it is under investigation.

Regards,
Customer Care Team

category: Credit reporting or other personal consumer reports
subject: Re: Complaint {complaint_id} — Credit Reporting Dispute
body:
Dear {customer_name},

Thank you for notifying us of a possible inaccuracy in your consumer report. We have recorded your dispute (ID {complaint_id}) and begun a reinvestigation of the information you identified.

As required by {clause}, we will complete our reinvestigation and share the results with you by {resolution_due}. Any information found to be inaccurate will be corrected or deleted.

Regards,
Customer Care Team

subject: Re: Complaint {complaint_id} — Debt Collection Concern
body:
Dear {customer_name},

Thank you for contacting us regarding the debt collection matter. Your complaint (ID {complaint_id}) has been registered and collection activity on the disputed item is being reviewed.

Under {clause}, we will validate the debt and respond to your dispute by {resolution_due}. Please retain any related correspondence for our review.

Regards,
Customer Care Team

subject: Re: Complaint {complaint_id} — Debt / Credit Management Concern
body:
Dear {customer_name},

Thank you for sharing your concern about your debt or credit-management service. We have logged your complaint (ID {complaint_id}) and our team is reviewing the details of your plan and payments.

In line with {clause}, we will provide an update by {resolution_due}.

Regards,
Customer Care Team

category: Money transfer, virtual currency, or money service
subject: Re: Complaint {complaint_id} — Money Transfer Concern
body:
Dear {customer_name},

Thank you for reporting an issue with your money transfer or money service. Your complaint (ID {complaint_id}) has been registered and we are tracing the transaction you described.

Under {clause}, we will complete our error review and respond by {resolution_due}.

Regards,
Customer Care Team

subject: Re: Complaint {complaint_id} — Mortgage Servicing Concern
body:
Dear {customer_name},

Thank you for contacting us about your mortgage. We acknowledge your complaint (ID {complaint_id}) and our servicing team is reviewing the escrow, payment, or modification matter you raised.

As required by {clause}, we will investigate and provide a written response by {resolution_due}.

Regards,
Customer Care Team

category: Payday loan, title loan, personal loan, or advance loan
subject: Re: Complaint {complaint_id} — Loan Concern
body:
Dear {customer_name},

Thank you for raising your concern about your loan. Your complaint (ID {complaint_id}) has been logged and our team is reviewing the loan terms, charges, or payments you identified.

In line with {clause}, we will respond by {resolution_due}.

Regards,
Customer Care Team

subject: Re: Complaint {complaint_id} — Prepaid Card Concern
body:
Dear {customer_name},

Thank you for reporting an issue with your prepaid card. We have registered your complaint (ID {complaint_id}) and are reviewing the balance or transaction activity you reported.

Under {clause}, we will complete our error review and update you by {resolution_due}.

Regards,
Customer Care Team

subject: Re: Complaint {complaint_id} — Student Loan Servicing Concern
body:
Dear {customer_name},

Thank you for contacting us about your student loan. Your complaint (ID {complaint_id}) has been logged and our servicing team is reviewing the payment, deferment, or forbearance matter you raised.

In line with {clause}, we will investigate and respond by {resolution_due}.

Regards,
Customer Care Team

subject: Re: Complaint {complaint_id} — Vehicle Finance Concern
body:
Dear {customer_name},

Thank you for raising your concern about your vehicle loan or lease. We have registered your complaint (ID {complaint_id}) and are reviewing the account, payment, or repossession matter you described.

Under {clause}, we will respond by {resolution_due}.

Regards,
Customer Care Team

subject: Re: Complaint {complaint_id}
body:
Dear {customer_name},

We acknowledge your complaint (ID {complaint_id}) regarding {category}. Our team is reviewing the matter and will provide an update by {resolution_due}.

Regards,
Customer Care Team
